message:
fix(show): eliminate unreachable!() with explicit error handling (beads_rust-e099)

Replace unreachable!() in execute_routed's format match with a proper
BeadsError::Config error return for unhandled output formats. Add test
documenting the structured-output guard that prevents Text/Csv from
reaching this branch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
